summary: Verified the Bearer-header / localStorage auth migration end-to-end. Backend: login & register return access_token + refresh_token in JSON body; all protected endpoints accept 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' alone (no cookies). Frontend: localStorage key 'ebrr_access_token' is populated post-login, all protected routes (/dashboard, /compare, /debtors, /audit) load with no 'Not authenticated' toast. Wizard auto-detect (both useEffect-on-paste and explicit button click) populates all 8 required mapping fields correctly.
action_items: OPTIONAL: Update /app/memory/test_credentials.md (still says 'tokens are httpOnly cookies, frontend uses withCredentials' — should mention new Bearer/localStorage pattern as primary auth).

OPTIONAL: Add a global 401 response interceptor in api.js that clears localStorage token and lets AuthContext redirect — currently only AuthContext.refresh() handles expired tokens, individual API calls just toast 'Not authenticated' until the user reloads.
critical_code_review_comments: Bearer header migration is implemented cleanly: api.js (44 lines) uses a single request interceptor; AuthContext calls setToken() on login/register and clears it on logout. withCredentials=true is preserved as a cookie fallback, which is safe.
Backend get_current_user (server.py:57) accepts EITHER cookie OR Authorization: Bearer — no breaking change; existing cookie-based flows still work.

Refresh-token flow is still cookie-only (POST /api/auth/refresh reads request.cookies.get('refresh_token')). If the user's browser blocks cookies entirely, refresh will fail after the 7-day access token expires. Consider also accepting refresh_token in the JSON body. Not blocking — access token TTL is 7d so most sessions never need refresh.

Wizard auto-detect is implemented twice: (1) debounced useEffect on bankCsv/invCsv change (line 95-100, silent), (2) explicit 'Auto-detect' button (line 194). Both paths verified to populate all 8 required mapping fields with the synthetic CSV provided in the test request.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login persistence + 4 protected routes + wizard auto-detect 8/8 fields)

seed_data_creation: Each register test creates a unique TEST_bearer_<uuid>@ebbiz.com user (not cleaned up — recommend periodic cleanup but no leakage risk).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bearer/localStorage migration verified 2026-05-20. Backend regression: pytest backend/tests/test_bearer_auth.py — 7/7 PASS (login body has access_token+refresh_token; register body same; /auth/me, /allocations, /allocations/preview-headers all return 200 with ONLY Authorization: Bearer <token> header and zero cookies; no-auth and invalid-Bearer both return 401). Frontend: login -> localStorage['ebrr_access_token'] set (228 chars), navigation to /dashboard /compare /debtors /audit all load with no 'Not authenticated' text/toast. Wizard /new: filled name=Test, period=2026-01, pasted bank CSV 'Date,Amount,Reference,Narrative\n2026-01-05,1200.00,INV-1001,Acme Corp' and invoice CSV 'Ref,Name:,Balance,Date\nINV-1001,Acme Corporation Ltd,1200.00,2025-12-15'. After 1.5s debounce all 8 mapping selects populated: bank_date=Date, bank_reference=Reference, bank_amount=Amount, invoice_number=Ref, invoice_debtor='Name:', invoice_amount=Balance, invoice_date=Date, invoice_outstanding=Balance. Auto-detect button click produced identical result.
